description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, these sandals work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBlack forefoot straps with gold piping Black heel collar with a buckled ankle loop strap (with gold piping)Beige footbed with brandingTPU outsole with branded grooves at the forefoot and a floral lug at the heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
